name: Unbelievable Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Pint Cool whip or whipped cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned fruit.
2. Grate the chocolate bars and set aside.
3. Combine the whipped cream with the sour cream.
4. Fold in the fruit and chocolate, then serve immediately.
5. Note: All fruit except blueberries (if frozen) can be combined and chilled overnight. Assemble just prior to serving for best results. Makes 6-8 generous servings.
This recipe is also suitable as a light dessert.
